raw_text: antonio lazetera aerospace engineer an admirer of everything that flies. enthusiastic to work, learn and contribute to the aerospaces future. personal information nationality: italian address: bra, 12042 (cn) - italy age: 26 years contact: +39 333 3598098 email: lazetera.antonio@gmail.com current employment: 01/2015 onwards altran consultant at selex es, torino, italy integrated surveillance systems engineer (full time) im working on the design and integration of an integrated surveillance system for the piaggio p1.hh hammerhead, a male-uav that is foreseen to be used for intelligence surveillance reconnaissance (isr), defense and security missions. the whole mission system consists of its sensors (radar, ais transponder, eo/ir turret) that will integrated on-board the aircraft, and the ground mission management system that will be used by mission pilots and operators. lam the ais equipment system engineer and my activities are the following: e to write requirements and test cases (using doors) e support activities for programmers e system integration, validation and verification activities e towrite different uis (user interface specification) documents. working experience: 09/2014-12/2014 red s.r.l., torino, italy automotive designer (full time) components design for cars of fiat chrysler automobiles group, using nx unigraphics software. education: 2014 2011-2012 1 year 2010-2013 3 years 6 months politecnico di torino, italy grade 95/100 qualifying examination for engineer universidad politécnica de madrid, spain scholarship: erasmus project - a full academic year of university politecnico di torino, italy grade 101/110 masters degree in aerospace engineering final dissertation: design of a fuel cell system for a long endurance unmanned aerial vehicle (uav) the thesis focused on the preliminary design of a hydrogen fuel cell system for a hale/uav (high altitude very-long endurance/unmanned aerial vehicle), a drone that is foreseen to be used for telecommunication & earth monitoring. this project is still with politecnico di torino and is ongoing. 2007-2010 politecnico di torino, italy grade 106/110 3 years bachelors degree in aerospace engineering thesis title: adaptation of turboprop regional transport vehicle for special missions 3 months the thesis focused on transforming a turboprop regional transport vehicle into an airborne early warning and control (aew&c) aircraft, essentially by installing a new generation radar system above the fuselage to satisfy the mission and incorporating an auxiliary power unit to increase the overall available power in order to raise the service ceiling. 2012 british study center (bsc) bournemouth, united kingdom 5 weeks general english certificate course a 5 weeks intensive general english course in uk helped radically me in improving my skills. skills: languages italian native spanish - fluent english - intermediate (ielts certificate: 6.5 bsc certificate: intermediate). computer skills software o0o0o0ooooo o) doors (system requirements and test cases) qt (user interface design) unigraphics (components design for cars) solidworks (course: industrial technical drawing. design of mechanical components) solid edge (course - madrid: graphic drawing. design of a mechanical assembly) nastran/patran (course: aeronautical structures. finite element static analysis of one dimensional pieces, composite panels and sandwich panels) matlab/simulink (course: automatic controls. simulation and analysis of dynamic systems and related control rings) microsoft office tools (word, excel, powerpoint). languages: c++ / visual basic / sql. additional skills social: an individual having a sociable personality, honest and respectful. able to work in groups as well as manage projects individually thanks to a problem solving mentality. an open minded outlook and curiosity to learn render me a flexible person in all situations. organizational: being orderly , precise and with very good organizational skills. artistic: good at artistic drawing and playing classical guitar. authorize the use of my personal data according to the italian legislative decree n196/2003 bra, may 18% 2015
